content.text: I need a function that checks if my game has ended based on whether the player has crashed or if all opponents have been defeated.
If both the player has crashed and there are no robots left, which win/loss condition takes precedence?
The loss condition ('You Died!') will always take precedence because checking for `self.player in self.crashes` is evaluated before checking if `self.robots` is empty.
Perfect, I appreciate the detailed analysis!
